Piece of Cake.title: Lucky You!
Piece of Cake.rule: There is no bad rule for you! However, if your opponent laughs during your game, you must resign.

Piece of Cake.title: Rooks on Rails
Piece of Cake.rule: Your rooks cannot leave the a and h files.

Piece of Cake.title: Sweet Tooth
Piece of Cake.rule: You must capture with a pawn on every turn if possible.

Piece of Cake.title: Crippled Calvary
Piece of Cake.rule: Your knights have tripped, hurt their legs and can no longer move

Piece of Cake.title: Frosting
Piece of Cake.rule: You cannot move any piece more than twice until every piece has been moved at least once.

Piece of Cake.title: Pacifist
Piece of Cake.rule: Go 10 turns without capturing a piece or a pawn.

Piece of Cake.title: Sonic's Ring of Infinity
Piece of Cake.rule: Once during your game, you have to move your king around a pawn in a full circle like a hula hoop.

Piece of Cake.title: Freeze Spell
Piece of Cake.rule: Read this rule out loud. Your opponent can cast a freeze spell on one of your pieces at any point during the game. If your piece is frozen, it cannot move the next turn.

Piece of Cake.title: Fruit Master
Piece of Cake.rule: Before every move, you have to say the name of a fruit. You cannot say the same fruit twice.

Piece of Cake.title: Left or Right?
Piece of Cake.rule: Read this rule out loud. You must move pieces on black squares with your RIGHT hand and pieces on white squares with your LEFT hand. You must move your king with BOTH hands. If you move a piece with the wrong hand, you lose.

Hard Tart.title: Sugar Rush
Hard Tart.rule: You must move your Queen at least once every 5 moves.

Hard Tart.title: OverCommitted
Hard Tart.rule: Once you move a piece onto your opponent's half of the board, that piece may not retreat back across the halfway line

Hard Tart.title: Gotta Push Em All
Hard Tart.rule: You have to move every pawn once before you can move any pawn twice.

Hard Tart.title: VIP Queen
Hard Tart.rule: If you lose your queen, you must resign.

Hard Tart.title: Scaredy Pawns
Hard Tart.rule: Your pawns cannot go into your opponent's half of the board.

Hard Tart.title: Crosshairs
Hard Tart.rule: You can't land a piece or pawn on the f-file or the 3rd rank.

Hard Tart.title: The Knights' Tour
Hard Tart.rule: Make 10 knight moves at the start of the game.

Hard Tart.title: Lazy Pawns
Hard Tart.rule: You can only move 4 pawns in the entire game. All other pawns are fast asleep.

Hard Tart.title: Back Scratcher
Hard Tart.rule: If an opponent's piece lands in your back rank, you must resign. If you land a piece in your opponent's back rank, you must read this rule out loud.

Hard Tart.title: Master of all Pieces
Hard Tart.rule: You have to move a different piece every turn. You cannot move the same piece twice in a row.

Hard Tart.title: Minor Inconvenience
Hard Tart.rule: Every second move, you must move a minor piece (knight or bishop) or a pawn.

Hard Tart.title: Arranged Marriage
Hard Tart.rule: You must castle queenside and if your queen is captured, you must resign.

Hard Tart.title: Jaden's Troll Opening
Hard Tart.rule: You must play g4/g5, h4/h5, b4/b5, a4/a5 and then play the bongcloud (move your king up to e2/e7)

Hard Tart.title: I Don't Want a Bishop!
Hard Tart.rule: You need to promote a pawn to a bishop within 30 moves and must resign if you fail.

Hard Tart.title: Dark Knight
Hard Tart.rule: Every 3 moves, you have to move a piece to a dark square.

Brain Freeze.title: Watch Your Back
Brain Freeze.rule: Every 4 moves, you have to make a backwards move.

Brain Freeze.title: Poisoned Pawns
Brain Freeze.rule: Once you capture a pawn with a piece, you can no longer move that piece for the rest of the game.

Brain Freeze.title: The Dayman
Brain Freeze.rule: You can only capture pieces on light coloured squares.

Brain Freeze.title: The Nightman
Brain Freeze.rule: You can only capture pieces on dark coloured squares.

Brain Freeze.title: Rough Morning
Brain Freeze.rule: Your first ten pawn moves must spell: 'BADBEDHEAD' (move the b pawn, then a pawn etc...). You can move your other pieces in between.

Brain Freeze.title: Oh No, My Everything!
Brain Freeze.rule: Sacrifice a knight and a bishop for pawns, a rook for a knight or bishop and a queen for a knight, bishop or rook.

Brain Freeze.title: BEB the Hungry Monster
Brain Freeze.rule: Your first 3 captures must spell 'BEB' (capture on the b file, then e file, then b file again).

Brain Freeze.title: Emo Pawns
Brain Freeze.rule: Your Pawns have turned emo and cannot move to a square that protects another pawn or piece. Pieces can move to squares protected by pawns.

Brain Freeze.title: The King's Bodyguard
Brain Freeze.rule: Your king is very important and has a bodyguard of 3 pieces. You have to keep at least 3 pieces within one square of your king at all times or you lose.

Brain Freeze.title: The Queen's Bodyguard
Brain Freeze.rule: Your queen is very important and has a bodyguard of 3 pieces. You have to keep at least 3 pieces within one square of your queen at all times or you lose.

Brain Freeze.title: Major Inconvenience
Brain Freeze.rule: Every second move, you must move a major piece (rook or queen).

Brain Freeze.title: For Once, You Hate Water
Brain Freeze.rule: Every 10 moves, the water level rises one rank and the pieces in the water can't move. You cannot move any pieces in the water either.

Brain Freeze.title: 3 Lives!
Brain Freeze.rule: If you lose 3 pawns in the game, you must resign.

Challenge.title: Pair of Pawns
Challenge.rule: You can only move two of your pawns.

Challenge.title: Straight up AntiChess
Challenge.rule: If you can take any of your opponent's pieces, you have to take that piece. If you have multiple pieces you can take, you can choose which one to take.

Challenge.title: Double Trouble
Challenge.rule: If you move a piece, your next move must be a move with the same kind of piece. If not possible, you can move any other piece.

Challenge.title: Ticking Time Bomb
Challenge.rule: Read this rule aloud. You only have 5 turns. For each capture you make, you get 3 more turns. If you run out of turns, you lose.

Challenge.title: Piece Sniper
Challenge.rule: Your first 5 captures must be a pawn, then a knight, then a rook, then a bishop, then a queen. You may not make any other captures in between.
In the opening, you must move 6 pawns, then 7 pieces.

Challenge.title: Yin and Yang
Challenge.rule: Every move, you have to move to a white square and then to a black square. You can choose which square to move to first.

Challenge.title: Cannibalism
Challenge.rule: Pieces can only capture pieces of the same type. For example, a rook can only capture rooks, a knight can only capture knights etc...

Challenge.title: We Stick Together
Challenge.rule: All your pieces must be next to at least one other piece.

Challenge.title: Black Hole
Challenge.rule: Read this out loud. Every 3 moves you make, your opponent can choose a new square that isn't occupied by one of your pieces. You cannot move to that square for the rest of the game.

Challenge.title: There's levels to this
Challenge.rule: You have to have the same amount of points as your opponent. If you have more or less points for three turns, then you lose.

Challenge.title: Food Coma
Challenge.rule: Every time you capture a piece, the piece which captured that piece cannot be moved for the rest of the game. This rule does not include pawns, and your king cannot capture.
